info.name: QuantLib Pro API
info.description:
Complete REST API collection for QuantLib Pro quantitative finance platform.

**17 domains | 75+ endpoints**

- Portfolio optimization and management
- Options pricing (Black-Scholes, Greeks)
- Risk analysis (VaR, CVaR, stress testing)
- Market regime detection
- Volatility surfaces
- Macro analysis
- Backtesting
- Advanced analytics
- Data management
- Market analysis & technical indicators
- Trading signals
- Liquidity metrics
- Systemic risk
- Execution optimization (VWAP/TWAP)
- Compliance
- UAT & testing

**Authentication:** JWT Bearer token via `/auth/login`

exec: // Auto-refresh token if expired or missing
console.log('Token missing or expired, fetching new one...');
pm.test('Optimize successful', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.optimal_weights).to.be.an('object'); });
pm.test('Price returned', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.price).to.be.a('number'); });
pm.test('VaR calculated', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.var_95 || d.var).to.be.a('number'); });
pm.test('Regime detected', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); const d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.current_regime || d.regime).to.be.a('string'); });

body.raw:
{
    "feedback_type": "bug",
    "title": "Portfolio optimizer slow on 50+ tickers",
    "description": "Optimization takes >30s when using more than 50 tickers",
    "severity": "MEDIUM",
    "module": "portfolio"
}
